title: Full Text of Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill Officially Published, Revealing 20-Year Lock-Up, Proof-of-Reserve Mandates
summary: The full text of H.R. 8957, officially published by Bitcoin Magazine, reveals a proposed 20-year lock-up on federally held bitcoin and proof-of-reserve mandates for entities participating in the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
body:
The full text of H.R. 8957, the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve bill, has been officially published, revealing significant details about its provisions. The bill proposes a 20-year lock-up period for any bitcoin held by the federal government, ensuring long-term holding strategies. Additionally, it mandates proof-of-reserve requirements for any entities participating in the reserve, aiming to enhance transparency and trust. 

The bill, written by Micah Zimmerman and published by Bitcoin Magazine, outlines the framework for the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. The 20-year lock-up is designed to stabilize the market by preventing short-term sales and ensuring the reserve's stability over time.
twitterThread: The full text of H.R. 8957 has been officially published, revealing a proposed 20-year lock-up on federally held bitcoin and proof-of-reserve mandates for the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
The bill, written by Micah Zimmerman and published by Bitcoin Magazine, aims to ensure long-term holding and transparency for the reserve.
